description.ko: 소리의 주파수가 빛나는 기하학적 파동과 역동적인 빛 입자로 변환되는 ECHO-0 시스템을 시각화하여, 소리의 보이지 않는 힘을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A visual representation of the ECHO-0 system, where sound frequencies are transformed into luminous geometric waves and kinetic light particles, illustrating the invisible power of acoustics.

prompt: Cinematic visualization of sound waves, ECHO-0 core unit emitting pulsating concentric rings of light, ethereal cyan and deep violet spectrum, fluid motion of sonic particles, frequency spectrum landscape, architectural acoustics, hyper-detailed digital art, 8k resolution, glowing neon nodes, abstract resonance patterns.
